additionalDescription: Compiled from Xeno-Canto, iNaturalist, and BioAcoustica recordings. Dataset split into train/validation/test subsets with a 60/20/20 distribution.
description: Large-scale dataset of insect sounds from Orthoptera and Cicadidae designed for machine learning and automatic acoustic identification. The dataset contains 26,298 audio recordings from 459 insect species curated from public bioacoustic repositories.
name: InsectSet459
title: InsectSet459: A large dataset for automatic acoustic identification of insects (Orthoptera and Cicadidae)
